title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Failure Case: Trace Events
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops trace events increment in an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Compare parallel speedup with communication, merge, and review cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
